import React from 'react'; function PlantList({ plants, onEdit, onDelete }) { return ( {plants.map(plant => ( ))}
Name Price Category Stock Care Tips Image Actions
{plant.name} {plant.price} {plant.category} {plant.stock} {plant.careTips ? (
  • Watering: {plant.careTips.watering || 'N/A'}
  • Sunlight: {plant.careTips.sunlight || 'N/A'}
  • Soil: {plant.careTips.soil || 'N/A'}
  • Pruning: {plant.careTips.pruning || 'N/A'}
  • Temperature: {plant.careTips.temperature || 'N/A'}
) : ( 'No care tips available' )} 		{plant.imageUrl && ( )}
); } export default PlantList;
